analysis.consistency: High. The feature clearly defines the trigger (3rd level) and the core mechanic (choosing a sacred oath) for the Paladin class.
analysis.quality: High. It sets the foundation for the Paladin's entire archetype progression, which is mechanically sound for TTRPG design.

mechanics.effect: The character chooses a sacred oath, which grants access to new features (oath spells, Channel Divinity) at 3rd, 7th, 15th, and 20th levels. This is a fundamental structural mechanic for the Paladin class.

analysis.suggested_edits: The description mentions a link to "#section-sacred-oaths". While this is contextually important for the source material, for an isolated data archive, ensure the definition of the specific oath chosen is linked or present elsewhere. Mechanically, the feature description itself is perfect.
